productName: SPR - 1g LIVE RESIN Shatter - Throat Goat
description: A brittle, translucent hybrid shatter of Throat Goat that snaps like glass — the old-school connoisseur's dab, prized for its stable, crystal-clear finish. Stable, potent, and clear, a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
